scripts.check: npm run check:syntax && npm run check:quality && npm run check:performance
scripts.check:syntax: node --check app.js && node --check community/posts.js && node --check events/app.js && node --check scripts/build-dist.mjs && node --check tests/deployment/verify-dist.mjs && node --check tests/deployment/smoke-dist.mjs
scripts.ci: npm run verify && npm run build && npm run verify:dist && npm run smoke:dist
